query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.orderStatus, o.userId, o.totalAmount, u.name, u.stampCount, u.lifetimeStamps 
FROM orders o 
LEFT JOIN users u ON o.userId = u.id 
WHERE o.orderStatus = 'completed' 
ORDER BY o.id DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
